{{Quote|Batu Rem is on leave, he shouldn't even be on this station. This man isn't him.|Lieutenant Grenn on the bounty hunter disguised as Batu Rem|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Batu Rem''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] officer in the [[Telos Security Force]] aboard [[Citadel Station]] over [[Telos IV|Telos]] following the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He served under the command of [[Dol Grenn]]. When Rem went on leave, he was replaced by an [[Batu Rem impostor|impostor]] who assumed his name.

Shortly after the security cameras shorted out, the imposter came over to [[Meetra Surik]]'s force cage and deactivated it, along with her companions', to kill the three of them. He failed and was discovered as an imposter by Grenn and the rest of the TSF Officers. Surik later found out that the latter arrived to Telos via a [[Tramp freighter/Legends|tramp freighter]] from [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].
